form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.19) when fourth over 450m at Shepparton in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Has two successes and five minors from 11 starts from box 1. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (26.19) when fourth over 450m at Shepparton in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Has two successes and five minors from 11 starts from box 1. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (23.20) over 400m at this track. Aided by a low draw and is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (23.20) over 400m at this track. Aided by a low draw and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 3 length third (23.27) over 400m at this track. Among the chances with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 3 length third (23.27) over 400m at this track. Among the chances with the right run.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 460m at this track, beaten 9 lengths. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 460m at this track, beaten 9 lengths. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 435m at Sale. Hard to recommend this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 435m at Sale. Hard to recommend this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Lost ground in home straight.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on March 16 over 450m at Ballarat behind Aston Transcend, beaten 13 lengths (26.64). Hard to tip with any confidence.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh in a Grade 5 on March 16 over 450m at Ballarat behind Aston Transcend, beaten 13 lengths (26.64). Hard to tip with any confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning into to home straight.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Hartland Duke at Ballarat last start over 390m (22.87). Has to be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a better race when third behind Hartland Duke at Ballarat last start over 390m (22.87). Has to be respected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th on April 1 over 435m at Sale behind Jams Donuts beaten 6 lengths (25.19) in a Grade 5. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th on April 1 over 435m at Sale behind Jams Donuts beaten 6 lengths (25.19) in a Grade 5. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 4th over 400m at this track beaten 3 lengths (23.27) behind Invictus Harmony in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2. Has claims if at his best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last outing finished 4th over 400m at this track beaten 3 lengths (23.27) behind Invictus Harmony in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2. Has claims if at his best.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (23.64) in a GR 5 at this track and returns after a three-and-a-half months break. Yet to win fresh but has been in the money two times. Will need the right run.
